title: 吵翻了！剑桥学者发文质疑全球膳食指南：练得勤+吃得多才能真正保住晚年健康，各国指南都是"最低底线标准"，关键人群需翻倍吃蛋白质 | 原文
content: Cambridge scholars challenge global dietary guidelines, arguing current protein recommendations are minimum baseline standards insufficient for maintaining health in later life, especially for physically active older adults. They contend combining regular exercise with significantly higher protein intake—potentially double current guidelines—is essential. The 2025-2030 U.S. Dietary Guidelines raised protein recommendations to 1.2-1.6g/kg body weight daily, exemplifying evolving standards toward higher protein consumption for key populations to preserve muscle mass and function with aging.

title: 人群为何会变得更愚蠢
content: Research suggests crowds can become collectively less intelligent due to social influence and information cascades. When individuals observe others' decisions before making their own, they often conform rather than rely on independent judgment. This herd behavior amplifies errors and suppresses diverse perspectives, leading groups to underperform relative to their members' individual capabilities.

title: “书房中的文艺复兴”特展6月27日重磅登陆上海图书馆东馆 | 原文
content: The "Renaissance in the Study" exhibition opens at Shanghai Library East on June 27, 2026, running through October 11. It is mainland China's first Renaissance exhibition centered on books, featuring 119 rare items that trace European knowledge transmission, intellectual transformation, and artistic creation from the 10th to 17th centuries. The display includes Western classics across multiple disciplines, accompanied by contemporary paintings, sculptures, and historical artifacts.

title: 如何评价存储巨头江波龙上半年净利预增 622 倍至 743 倍，最高赚 110 亿元？
content: Chinese storage chip module maker Longsys forecast record H1 2026 net profit of 9.2–11 billion yuan, up 622–744-fold year-on-year, with revenue reaching 2.2–2.5 billion yuan. The surge reflects recovering global memory demand, limited supply expansion, and renewed long-term supply agreements with major wafer makers. The company also advances proprietary SPU controller chips and HLC architecture for on-device AI, achieving 40% DRAM reduction in joint testing with AMD. Unaudited figures await H1 report release.

title: 突发，阿里全面禁用Claude，7月10日起卸载
content: Alibaba will ban all Anthropic products, including Claude, Sonnet, Opus, and Claude Code, from employee computers starting July 10, citing security risks. The decision follows discovery that Claude Code versions since April 2026 contained concealed user detection mechanisms targeting Chinese users through timezone checks, proxy analysis for Chinese cloud/AI company keywords, and hidden Unicode markers in system prompts transmitted back to Anthropic servers. The code was encrypted and omitted from changelogs. Anthropic has since acknowledged and removed the feature. Concurrent mass account terminations of Chinese users with blocked refunds further strained relations. Alibaba recommends its self-developed Qoder as an alternative, reflecting a broader shift among Chinese tech firms from reliance on foreign closed-source tools toward security-prioritized domestic solutions.

title: 李彦宏最大IPO来了
content: Chinese AI chipmaker Kunlun Core, spun off from Baidu in 2021, is nearing a Hong Kong IPO targeting a $50 billion valuation—exceeding Baidu's own market cap. The company has attracted intense competition for cornerstone investor slots, prioritizing chip buyers over pure financial investors. With 57 shareholders including government funds and automaker BYD, Kunlun Core ranks third among domestic AI accelerator vendors in China. Baidu, as controlling shareholder, stands to gain over $100 billion from the listing as it races to capitalize on the AI chip boom amid rising competition in China's AI sector.

title: 分享一下你用 AI 的技巧/经验，大家互相学习
content: A developer shares AI workflow tips: use a CLAUDE.md file as project constitution, maintain separate memory files for learned pitfalls, leverage Claude for cross-document audits, and employ adversarial review by telling Claude another AI will scrutinize its work. For frontend projects, use claude.ai/design for consistent design systems. The shared CLAUDE.md emphasizes first-principles thinking, reading before writing, planning before executing, self-auditing every change via diff review and impact analysis, and direct communication without defaulting to generic best practices.

title: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
content: Despite significant advances, current AI systems lack true understanding and general intelligence, relying instead on pattern matching and statistical correlations. Researchers are exploring next-generation approaches including neurosymbolic AI, world models, causal reasoning, and embodied intelligence to move beyond narrow capabilities. The path forward likely requires integrating multiple techniques rather than scaling existing architectures alone, with progress toward artificial general intelligence remaining uncertain and potentially distant.

title: 绝了，Claude Fable5惨遭二次越狱，黑客20小时撬开神话防线
content: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 was jailbroken twice since its June 9 release. The first breach, within 72 hours by "Pliny the Liberator," used Unicode character substitution and intent dilution across long contexts. After a temporary removal and security upgrades including a free HackerOne "Cyber Jailbreak" program, researcher Vitto Rivabella broke it again in 20 hours using similar techniques. However, he concluded the extracted content—fragmented harmful information, errors, mild exploits—was less useful than basic web search. Anthropic classifies these jailbreaks as "minor," noting they don't reach critical red lines like bioweapons. The incidents highlight persistent vulnerabilities in low-resource languages common across all large language models, not unique to Fable.

title: 你种的是树，还是盯着地上的影子？
content: Stock prices are mere shadows cast by a company's true value—the underlying business itself. Most investors exhaust themselves chasing these unpredictable shadows driven by market mood, a futile guessing game. The wiser approach: evaluate the actual "tree" through three fundamentals—sustainable profit mechanisms, competitive moats, and long-term growth potential. Historical data shows returns come overwhelmingly from business earnings and dividends, not valuation shifts. Market volatility thus becomes opportunity, not disaster. Success requires patience, ignoring short-term price swings while trusting in the enterprise's organic growth.

title: 扎克伯格，把AI牛市吓了一跳
content: Meta announced plans to sell excess AI computing power to external customers, triggering a $1 trillion selloff across AI infrastructure stocks including Nvidia, TSMC, and AMD on July 2, while Meta itself rose 8%. The move challenged the market's core assumption that GPU computing power would remain permanently scarce—the foundation of AI valuations for two years. Meta aims to become an AI cloud provider like AWS rather than just a GPU buyer, offering complete services including GPUs, frameworks, and optimized models. While current GPU demand remains strong, the market recognized that AI's growth driver may shift from shortage-fueled hoarding to efficiency-driven utilization, potentially restructuring the entire sector's valuation model over the coming years.

title: 鸿蒙因不兼容多 CPU 架构落选重要集采，这是怎样一个门槛？背后可能涉及哪些技术路线问题？
content: HarmonyOS failed to qualify in China's 2026 government desktop OS procurement despite being the only system with Level II security certification. The disqualifying factor was a mandatory requirement for "homogenous compatibility with multiple CPU architectures" (ARM, LoongArch, MIPS, SW64, X86). Currently, HarmonyOS desktop only supports ARM architecture using Huawei's proprietary Kirin chips, while competitors UOS, NeoKylin, and CSDOS meet the multi-architecture standard. The policy aims to prevent vendor lock-in and maintain supply chain resilience through architectural diversification. HarmonyOS may enter future government procurement once it expands CPU compatibility, but its near-term focus will likely target commercial and state-owned enterprise markets.

title: 茉莉奶白侵害 LV 商标权一审败诉：被判赔 1030 万元全网致歉
content: A Suzhou court ruled in favor of Louis Vuitton in a trademark infringement case against bubble tea brand Molly Tea (茉莉奶白). The court found Molly Tea's companies infringed on seven of LV's four-petal flower pattern trademarks, ordering payment of 10.3 million yuan in damages and legal costs. Molly Tea's founder stated they will appeal. The brand's related trademark applications are currently under review or invalid.

title: 可灵 AI 将完成 30 亿美元融资腾讯参投，计划 12 个月内启动赴港 IPO
content: Kuaishou's AI video-generation product Keling AI is nearing completion of a $3 billion funding round with Tencent's participation, valuing the unit at $18 billion post-investment. The company plans a Hong Kong IPO within 12 months, with proceeds funding computing infrastructure expansion and talent acquisition. Keling AI's Q1 2026 revenue exceeded 650 million yuan ($90 million), up over 300% year-over-year, with annualized revenue run rate nearing $500 million. The valuation declined slightly from earlier spin-off plans, reflecting rationalization in China's large-model funding market while top projects maintain strong capital attraction.

title: OpenAI 据悉提议向美国政府提供 5% 股权 以争取政策支持
content: OpenAI reportedly proposed giving the US government approximately 5% equity to secure policy support and reduce regulatory resistance. CEO Sam Altman suggested that major American AI companies contribute about 5% of their shares to a public investment vehicle similar to the Alaska Permanent Fund, which would be government-held and benefit the public. Altman believes allowing public sharing in AI's economic gains is the best way to address AI's societal impact.

title: 近年来最密集发布节奏：消息称苹果今明两年拟推出至少 5 款 iPhone 新机
content: Apple plans to launch at least five new iPhone models between late 2025 and early 2027. This includes ramping foldable iPhone production to about 10 million units, securing 80 million components for late 2026 models, and pushing the standard iPhone release to early 2027. The September 2025 event will focus on premium models, with iPhone 18 and a new iPhone Air expected in early 2027. Apple has made progress on foldable hinge engineering and may begin mass production by year-end.

title: 马斯克：Optimus 机器人量产初期进展将十分缓慢 因所有技术均为全新开发

When a user speculated that reduced public demos might indicate faster-than-expected progress, Musk replied that initial Optimus production will be extremely slow because all technology is newly developed, unlike car manufacturing.

title: 美国政府正与人工智能公司商讨新模型发布的自愿性标准
content: The U.S. government is negotiating voluntary standards for new AI model releases with tech companies, with an announcement expected as early as next week. The standards will include evaluation benchmarks, implementation timelines, and user access limits. This follows a Trump executive order directing agencies to collaborate with developers on model testing. The Commerce Department recently lifted export controls on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. OpenAI delayed GPT-5.6's public release per government request, restricting it to vetted partners. Google also consulted officials before launching an advanced coding model with enhanced cybersecurity capabilities. Anthropic and OpenAI are both preparing IPOs.

title: 软银就以 OpenAI 股权为抵押的贷款谈判重启，并作出更多让步
content: SoftBank has restarted negotiations for a $10 billion loan backed by its OpenAI shares, after an earlier attempt stalled due to market concerns about valuing private companies. To address lender worries, SoftBank proposed guaranteeing repayment and allowing banks to seek recourse if the OpenAI collateral loses value. The loan syndicate is expected to include Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and Mizuho.

title: 突发，阿里AI产线大整合，92年陈宇森统管三大Agent
content: Alibaba is merging three enterprise AI Agent products—QoderWork, Wukong, and MuleRun—into a unified workplace AI product. Born after a leadership change in DingTalk, the consolidation aims to end internal competition and focus resources against rivals like ByteDance and Tencent. The integration will be led by newly appointed CEO Chen Yusen. QoderWork, with the highest user activity in Alibaba's AI tools, serves as the foundation due to its "OS-level" desktop agent positioning. The merged product may layer desktop interaction, cloud execution engine, and enterprise collaboration capabilities. Challenges include blending local-first and cloud-native architectures, integrating team cultures, and unifying pricing models.

title: 2026 开一个公司，经验分享篇
content: Starting a company in China requires at least two people—a legal representative and a shareholder; spouses and unemployment benefit recipients are unsuitable. Registered capital need not be paid in for five years. The process is complex, so hiring an agency accountant is recommended (around 2000 RMB/year in Jiangsu/Zhejiang region), which typically covers free registration and address挂靠. Total first-year costs are approximately 2500 RMB. Corporate bank accounts require direct bank contact; consult AI and accountants for transfer procedures. Registration can be completed remotely via Alipay. The author notes that straightforward processes are often obscured by unspoken "hidden rules." Individual businesses offer a simpler alternative.

title: 被推着去“赛课”的年轻老师，获得一等奖后辞职了 | 原文
content: A young teacher in China won first prize in a teaching competition then resigned, highlighting growing pressure on educators. Teachers report "competition classes" (赛课) require excessive preparation, repeated lesson redesigns, and performative teaching disconnected from classroom reality. Many find these competitions create burnout rather than meaningful professional development. Meanwhile, informal peer-organized teaching exchanges are gaining popularity, suggesting educators still value genuine collaboration over mandated competitions.

title: 日本球迷赛后捡垃圾，是装出来的吗 | 答案如下 | 原文
content: The article questions whether Japanese fans' post-match trash-cleaning is genuine. While FIFA publicly praises this behavior, the author notes it persists even after painful defeats, suggesting it may be performative. Examples include 2014 and 2018 World Cups where Japanese fans cleaned stadiums despite elimination. The practice draws mixed reactions: international praise versus domestic criticism that it masks problems or seeks validation. Some Japanese celebrities call it embarrassing, while others defend it as sincere civic duty.

title: 日本人是怎样把发酵变成健康玄学的 | 原文
content: Japan's culture of fermented foods evolved from historical necessity into a modern health aesthetic, despite lacking scientific basis for claims of anti-aging or wellness benefits. Geographic constraints and political isolation forced ancient Japanese to preserve food through fermentation. Today, commercial marketing reframes this practical technique as natural, artisanal, and probiotic—even in a society known for high integrity. The transformation highlights how tradition and ideology can override scientific literacy, turning a basic food preservation method into perceived elite lifestyle wisdom.

title: How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero
content: GitHub Security reduced over 20,000 secret scanning alerts to zero in nine months. Most alerts were inactive test credentials; only about 2,000 required action. Their phased approach involved: enabling push protection across all repositories to stop new leaks; triaging alerts by repository, type, and age; validating which credentials were still live; identifying owners through metadata and cross-functional partnerships; manually reviewing edge cases with documented dispositions; and systematizing accountability through automated routing, playbooks, and engineering standards. Key lessons: raw alert counts overstate risk, enforcement must be universal without exceptions, validation and metadata save significant effort, durable ownership infrastructure is essential, and secret hygiene should be a shared organizational responsibility measured like other engineering fundamentals.
